---
output: github_document
---

```r
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# jiebaRS

`jiebaRS` aims to be a drop-in replacement for `jiebaR` for common user
workflows. `jiebaRS` 提供了对 `jiebaR`
功能和接口的兼容，但采用了更现代的内部实现，并使用了基于 `jieba-rs` 的 Rust
后端。平均来说，分词效率比 `jiebaR` 提高了 xx% 。
